commands.review_summary:
The PR makes Discord message search accept query/content aliases, infer a missing guild id from normalized channel context, avoid session-channel injection for explicit filters, and adds regression tests.

PR surface: Source +47, Tests +121. Total +168 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for source-level reproduction: current main requires guildId before Discord search can use current-channel context, and the linked issue includes live guild-channel logs. I did not run a live Discord session in this read-only review.
